page_content:
Formerly: BSOS388E.

Additional Information: Students must have requested and received approval for their practicum experience prior to enrollment.

GVPT358 Study Abroad Seminar in Political Science (3 Credits) The study of topics in political science. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

GVPT359 Topics in Comparative Politics (3 Credits) The study of topics in comparative politics. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
